inputs.label: Kesme Terimi (b0)
inputs.businessContext: Log-odds value when all predictor variables are zero.

businessContext_i18n.en: Log-odds value when all predictor variables are zero.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tüm tahmin değişkenleri sıfır olduğunda log-odds değeri.
businessContext_i18n.de: Log-Odds-Wert, wenn alle Prädiktorvariablen null sind.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Valeur log-odds lorsque toutes les variables prédictives sont nulles.
businessContext_i18n.es: Valor de log-odds cuando todas las variables predictoras son cero.
businessContext_i18n.ar: قيمة اللوغاريتم النسبي عندما تكون جميع متغيرات التوقع صفرًا.

inputs.label: Coefficient 1 (b1)
inputs.businessContext: Effect of a one-unit increase in the first predictor variable on the log-odds.

businessContext_i18n.en: Effect of a one-unit increase in the first predictor variable on the log-odds.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Birinci tahmin değişkenindeki bir birimlik artışın log-odds üzerindeki etkisi.
businessContext_i18n.de: Effekt einer Einheit Erhöhung der ersten Prädiktorvariablen auf die Log-Odds.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Effet d'une augmentation d'une unité de la première variable prédictive sur le log-odds.
businessContext_i18n.es: Efecto de un aumento de una unidad en la primera variable predictora sobre el log-odds.
businessContext_i18n.ar: تأثير زيادة وحدة واحدة في متغير التوقع الأول على اللوغاريتم النسبي.

inputs.label: Value 1 (x1)
inputs.businessContext: Actual value of the first predictor variable.

businessContext_i18n.en: Actual value of the first predictor variable.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Valeur réelle de la première variable prédictive.
businessContext_i18n.es: Valor real de la primera variable predictora.

inputs.label: Coefficient 2 (b2)
inputs.businessContext: Effect of a one-unit increase in the second predictor variable on the log-odds.

businessContext_i18n.en: Effect of a one-unit increase in the second predictor variable on the log-odds.
businessContext_i18n.tr: İkinci tahmin değişkenindeki bir birimlik artışın log-odds üzerindeki etkisi.
businessContext_i18n.de: Effekt einer Einheit Erhöhung der zweiten Prädiktorvariablen auf die Log-Odds.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Effet d'une augmentation d'une unité de la deuxième variable prédictive sur le log-odds.
businessContext_i18n.es: Efecto de un aumento de una unidad en la segunda variable predictora sobre el log-odds.
businessContext_i18n.ar: تأثير زيادة وحدة واحدة في متغير التوقع الثاني على اللوغاريتم النسبي.

inputs.label: Value 2 (x2)
inputs.businessContext: Actual value of the second predictor variable.

businessContext_i18n.en: Actual value of the second predictor variable.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Valeur réelle de la deuxième variable prédictive.
businessContext_i18n.es: Valor real de la segunda variable predictora.

inputs.label: Coefficient 3 (b3)
inputs.businessContext: Effect of a one-unit increase in the third predictor variable on the log-odds.

businessContext_i18n.en: Effect of a one-unit increase in the third predictor variable on the log-odds.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Üçüncü tahmin değişkenindeki bir birimlik artışın log-odds üzerindeki etkisi.
businessContext_i18n.de: Effekt einer Einheit Erhöhung der dritten Prädiktorvariablen auf die Log-Odds.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Effet d'une augmentation d'une unité de la troisième variable prédictive sur le log-odds.
businessContext_i18n.es: Efecto de un aumento de una unidad en la tercera variable predictora sobre el log-odds.
businessContext_i18n.ar: تأثير زيادة وحدة واحدة في متغير التوقع الثالث على اللوغاريتم النسبي.

inputs.label: Value 3 (x3)
inputs.businessContext: Actual value of the third predictor variable.

businessContext_i18n.en: Actual value of the third predictor variable.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Valeur réelle de la troisième variable d'estimation.
businessContext_i18n.es: Valor real de la tercera variable predictora.

formulas.linearCombination: intercept + coef1 * value1 + coef2 * value2 + coef3 * value3
formulas.linearCombination_aux: intercept + coef1 * value1 + coef2 * value2 + coef3 * value3
